title: gymnadenia plantaginea
intro: Gymnadenia plantaginea, also known as the lady's glove orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Eastern Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gymnadenia plantaginea include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
